question_text: Two identical plastic rods are both rubbed with wool and become negatively charged. What will happen when the two rods are brought close together?

options.label: C
options.text: They will have no effect on each other

explanation: Both rods have the same type of charge (negative), and like charges always repel each other. This is one of the fundamental rules of static electricity: charges that are the same push away from each other.
